arts.ttl: What Arne Slot thinks is 'obvious' about Liverpool Carabao Cup final after PSG agony
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has been speaking ahead of the League Cup final against Newcastle United at Wembley on Sunday

arts.ttl: ‘So unpredictable’: Bryan Mbeumo says Liverpool have a player who can literally do ‘everything’ on the pitch
arts.sum: Bryan Mbeumo has been full of praise for one of Liverpool’s star players. Bryan Mbeumo has been linked to Liverpool recently as the Reds potentially...

arts.ttl: Les Ferdinand's off-air Sky Sports advice to Alexander Isak after Newcastle United 'disrespect'
arts.sum: Les Ferdinand has advised Alexander Isak to take any links with Arsenal as a major "compliment" but feels the Sweden star can achieve everything he needs to at St James' Park. However, Ferdinand said: "All centre-forwards have that selfish streak when it comes to scoring goals but I like Isak's style, he is a 9 or a 10, because he sees passes that put other people in.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak speaks out on Liverpool and makes admission over Newcastle transfer links
arts.sum: Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak on coming up against Virgil van Dijk in the Carabao Cup final and what lies in store for his long-term future

arts.ttl: Liverpool capt Van Dijk eyes place among greats
arts.sum: Liverpool's Virgil van Dijk has said winning a second Carabao Cup against Newcastle would give him a place among the captains who had achieved great things at the club.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk hits back at Wayne Rooney 'lazy' jibe
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk defended himself after former Manchester United forward Wayne Rooney heavily criticised the Dutch skipper.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have two new Newcastle threats to deal with after injury blow
arts.sum: There will be a couple of different threats for Liverpool to nullify from their opponents compared to the win at Anfield two weeks ago

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk enters Carabao Cup final with will ‘to win so badly’ as Liverpool to be judged on trophy haul
arts.sum: Liverpool will be looking to defend their Carabao Cup title against Newcastle this weekend.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea have enquired about signing 'world-class' Liverpool star after he rejected new Reds contract
'The expectation' - Arne Slot accepts Liverpool demands as Carabao Cup final admission made
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he is fully aware of the demands on him to add silverware to the Anfield trophy cabinet as Liverpool go in search of a 11th League Cup at Wembley this weekend
